checks.name: project_verify
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: required_optional_prompt_static
checks.command: rg -n "_aiRequired|必須材料は指定せず|使える場合のみ|toggleAiIngredientRequired" app.html
checks.result: required/optional state, prompt text, and badge toggle are present
